text: Imagine a world where you can clone your best recruiters to handle every client
requisition, every application, every candidate, all at the same time. Because when it's done right,
it shouldn't feel like software. It should feel like this.
Hi Jose, this is Sara calling on behalf of LATM Staffing. We're reaching out because we think
you'd be a great fit for a senior data scientist role. Do you have a couple of minutes to chat?
Is that something you'd be interested in? Yeah, that sounds interesting.
Just to confirm, is your RN license active in Texas? Actually, just send a text. I'm unloading
the truck right now. Perfect. I'll text you next steps shortly. That wasn't three recruiters. That
was Sara calling all three candidates at the same time. Sara empowers your recruiters to focus on
what actually matters. She understands your roles, your clients, and how your team actually operates,
and then handles the manual work behind the scenes. She'll reach out across phone,
SMS, WhatsApp, whatever works best, and she never forgets to follow up.
If a new job comes in, Sara will find the best candidates for that job. She will build a custom
workflow and start doing the outreach all before you finish your morning coffee. You get to stay
in control. You get to adjust the workflows, set the tone, and you will get notified the moment
a top candidate responds and is ready to share with the client.
Hey, seriously? That was fast.
Ascendia isn't just a voice AI tool. It's the intelligence layer that lets you clone your
best recruiters so your business can run faster, smarter, and at scale. Because the future isn't
about ten X in your recruiters anymore. It's about cloning your best ones and letting them run
everywhere.
